extortion.description: ASKUL Corporation, founded in 1963 and headquartered in Tokyo, is a leading Japanese e-commerce company serving both businesses (B2B) and consumers (B2C). It offers office supplies, daily goods, medical products, and logistics services through platforms such as ASKUL, SOLOEL ARENA, and LOHACO. The company operates its own distribution centers, ensuring fast delivery and efficient supply chain management. ASKUL also provides additional services like printing, office design, and digital business solutions. The company emphasizes sustainability, digital transformation, and recycling initiatives.
